title: Color Theme - Switching theme while Phone is set to Dark Theme
scenario: Color Theme switching between Follow Phone Theme, Light Theme, and Dark Theme does not apply immediately across all app screens or persist after app restart on Poly Studio Mobile
steps: 1. Set the phone system settings to Dark Mode.
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home → Account → Color Theme.
3. Tap 'Follow Phone Theme' and observe the app UI.
4. Navigate through all app screens: Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, DFU screens, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, and Onboarding screens.
5. Return to Account → Color Theme and tap 'Light Theme'. Observe the app UI immediately change.
6. Navigate through all app screens again (Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, DFU screens, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, Onboarding screens).
7. Return to Account → Color Theme and tap 'Dark Theme'. Observe the app UI immediately change.
8. Navigate through all app screens again (Home, Device Settings, Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer, Notifications, DFU screens, Poly Lens Menu, User Guides, Onboarding screens).
9. Force close the Poly Studio Mobile app and reopen it.
10. Navigate through all app screens again and verify the previously selected theme (Dark Theme) is still applied.
11. Return to Account → Color Theme and tap the currently selected theme (Dark Theme) again.
12. Observe if any UI change occurs.
expected: The selected color theme (Follow Phone Theme, Light Theme, or Dark Theme) is applied immediately across all app screens. The theme persists after app restart. Tapping the currently selected theme does nothing (no UI change).
